title: Christmas Claws
description: Christmas? Santa is on the way. This is the best Crystal PVP Christmas pack. Snow and candy canes are the best fr. Ft short sword, Small shield, low fire and small totem. Now go out and enjoy the hohoho pop sound and dominate the holidays.
body:
## **❓ What is it?**

A christmas twist on the classic default textures that brings the holly and jolly to your pixelated adventures. This pack was made by KlasClaws

## **📦 Features:**

- Custom Hotbar, Gui, Textures and Sounds.
- Reduces sizes of golden apples, totems, and more.
- Compatible with versions 1.6.1-1.20.4+( 1.20.4+ is recommended )
- Custom AppleSkin texture.
- Focuses mainly on an enhanced CPVP and SMP experience.
- Easy / Light and will not use many more resources.

## **🙋‍♂️ Questions:**

### Does Christmas Claws work with Shaders?
- Should work if the shader doesn't change in-game textures I use shaders all the time
and prefer it with shaders.
### Am I allowed to use this pack in a video, live stream, or "post"?
- Yes, I would be honored. If you could provide credit to the pack I would appreciate it 
but it is not required.

## **📜 Credits:**

- KlasClaws for pack creation, design, and ownership
- Shaders for Gallery pictures ComplimentryUnbound 5.2.2
